metadata.description: Claude Code plugins by Digital Process Tools — the team behind DVSI.

plugins.name: remember
plugins.description: Continuous memory for Claude Code. Sessions are extracted, summarized, and compressed into layered daily logs. Claude remembers what you did yesterday.

plugins.name: supertool
plugins.description: Batched file operations for autonomous Claude Code runs. Collapses N reads/greps/globs into one Bash round-trip — fewer output tokens, less cache growth, less wall time. Ships with an opt-in enforcement mode that blocks competing tools.
